design_philosophy.core_concept: Admissions is chaotic; AQIS is the antidote. The design prioritizes reduced cognitive load, data density without clutter, and clear hierarchy. It feels like a 'Command Center'—calm, authoritative, and predictive.
key_principles: Density with Breathing Room: Use high-density grids for data, but ample padding inside containers.
Color as Logic: Color is used strictly for status and action. Decoration is minimal.
The 'Inter' Polish: Since Inter is mandated, we use 'tracking-tight' on headings and 'tracking-wide' on uppercase labels to avoid the default look.
AI Visibility: AI features get special visual treatment (subtle gradients/borders) to distinguish 'Machine' from 'Human' data.

rules: Never use default letter-spacing for Headings; always use 'tracking-tight'.
Labels and overlines must be Uppercase + Tiny + Wide Spacing.

usage_rules: Sidebar must be Navy (#1E2A4A) in Light Mode. In Dark Mode, it can shift to Deep Slate (#0F172A).
Main Content background is OFF-WHITE (#F8FAFC), not pure white.
Cards are Pure White with subtle borders.
Do not use gradients for backgrounds unless it is an 'AI Analysis' card.

layout.structure: Sidebar Navigation (Fixed Left) + Top Header + Main Content Area

buttons.style: h-9 px-4 rounded-md font-medium transition-all active:scale-95

cards.style: bg-white dark:bg-slate-900 border border-slate-200 dark:border-slate-800 rounded-lg shadow-[0_1px_3px_rgba(0,0,0,0.05)]
cards.ai_card: bg-gradient-to-br from-white to-blue-50/50 border border-blue-100 dark:from-slate-900 dark:to-blue-950/30 dark:border-blue-900

inputs.style: h-9 rounded-md border-slate-200 focus:ring-2 focus:ring-blue-500/20 focus:border-blue-500

badges.style: inline-flex items-center rounded-full px-2.5 py-0.5 text-xs font-semibold transition-colors focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-ring focus:ring-offset-2

tables.header: h-10 px-4 text-left align-middle font-medium text-muted-foreground bg-slate-50/50

login_bg.usage: Login page right split-screen background. Overlay with blue-900 at 50% opacity.

accessibility.contrast: Ensure 4.5:1 for normal text. Use 'text-slate-600' or darker on white backgrounds.
accessibility.focus: Visible ring-2 ring-blue-500 ring-offset-2 on all interactive elements.
accessibility.aria: All icon-only buttons must have aria-label.

universal_guidelines: Do not use gradients for backgrounds unless specified.
Do not use generic centered layouts. Use grid layouts.
All interactive elements MUST include data-testid attribute.
Do not use 'transition: all'. Specify properties.
Customize scrollbars to be thin and match the theme.
instructions_to_main_agent: Start by setting up the 'Layout' component with the Sidebar and Header.
Implement the 'ThemeContext' or use 'next-themes' logic for the dark/light toggle immediately.
Mock the backend using 'localStorage'. Create a 'services/mockApi.js' file to handle CRUD operations.
Use 'Recharts' for the Analytics dashboard. Create a dedicated 'components/charts' folder.
Ensure the Excel upload parses data client-side using 'xlsx' and populates the query list.
The 'AI Analysis' card in the drawer should be static mock data for now, but styled to look generated.
